x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Predictive Intelligence powers Now Assist similarity, classification, and routing recommendations. Without active PI, AI-driven incident routing, similar record suggestions, and field predictions are unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Predictive Intelligence (com.glide.platform_ml) via sys_plugins_list.do. Train PI solutions on incident, change, and case data after activation. PI requires a minimum of 1,000 historical records per solution to train effectively.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cec
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Predictive Intelligence powers Now Assist similarity, classification, and routing recommendations. Without active PI, AI-driven incident routing, similar record suggestions, and field predictions are unavailable.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Predictive Intelligence Plugin Status</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Use functional evidence — ml_solution table existing and being valid
    // means PI is installed regardless of scope naming conventions
    var testGr = new GlideRecord('ml_solution');
    testGr.setLimit(1);
    testGr.query();
    var piActive = testGr.isValid();

    if (piActive) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'Predictive Intelligence is active',
            finding: 'Predictive Intelligence is active. AI-driven routing, similarity matching, and classification recommendations are available for Now Assist.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'Predictive Intelligence not found or inactive',
            finding: 'Predictive Intelligence is not active. PI powers Now Assist similarity matching, classification, and AI-driven routing — all of these capabilities are unavailable without PI.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006108</number>
<order>40</order>
<remediation_guidance>Activate Predictive Intelligence (com.glide.platform_ml) via sys_plugins_list.do. Train PI solutions on incident, change, and case data after activation. PI requires a minimum of 1,000 historical records per solution to train effectively.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cec</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
